title: Lifestyles - Canada.ca
content:
From stress to responsible drinking to travel health, It's Your Health ( IYH ) provides you with the information you need to make informed decisions about your health and safety.
A joint publication of Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada, It's Your Health is a series of over 150 articles on a wide range of health and safety issues. It's Your Health covers the topics young Canadians need to stay in top form.
To view all the articles available go to the complete alphabetical list or subscribe to IYH to be notified electronically whenever an article is updated or a new article is released. Subscribe now .
- Clinical Trials and Drug Safety
- Tanning and your health
